svg.title: ERC-8162 Agent Subscription flow
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing the two phases of ERC-8162. Phase A (subscribe, onchain): the client calls subscribe on the Subscription Registry, the registry transfers ERC-20 tokens directly to the agent owner, and returns a subscription ID. Phase B (access, HTTP): the client makes a plain request, receives HTTP 402 with a SUBSCRIPTION-REQUIRED header, signs an EIP-712 proof of subscription, retries with a SUBSCRIPTION-SIGNATURE header, the agent service verifies the proof by calling verifyAccess on the registry, and the resource is returned. Blue arrows are onchain steps, teal arrows are HTTP-bound steps.
